summary: Iteration 2 testing of ReportBridge features: demo onboarding, demo banner, KPI cards, charts, password validation, ObjectId validation, dashboard, export PDF, edit summary. All 9 backend tests pass. Core features work. One bug found: post-signup redirect to demo preview is broken.

ui_bugs.issue: After successful registration, user is redirected to /app (dashboard) instead of /app/reports/{demo_report_id}/preview. Root cause: PublicRoute re-renders when setUser(data) is called and its <Navigate to='/app' replace /> overrides the programmatic navigate('/app/reports/.../preview') call in handleSubmit. The toast 'Here's your demo report to get started' shows but user lands on dashboard, not preview.

action_items: Fix signup redirect to demo preview: PublicRoute race condition prevents navigate() to /app/reports/{id}/preview. Fix: In SignupPage, before calling navigate, either (a) don't setUser before navigating (store demo_report_id and redirect first), or (b) use a different mechanism - store demo_report_id in sessionStorage before setUser, then in AppDashboard redirect if found, or (c) move the navigate() before setUser() in AuthContext.register.
critical_code_review_comments: PublicRoute in App.js: When user registers, setUser(data) is called in AuthContext which causes PublicRoute to render <Navigate to='/app' replace /> BEFORE the navigate('/app/reports/.../preview') from SignupPage completes. This is a classic React Router + state race condition.

Fix suggestion: In AuthContext.register(), return the data BEFORE calling setUser, then in SignupPage: navigate first, then setUser via a separate mechanism. Alternatively, pass the redirect URL through navigation state and handle in App level.

success_rate.frontend: 85% (signup redirect fails, all other features work)

seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ users created during backend tests (auto-cleaned by test). UI test created newuiuser{timestamp}@test.com.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend 100% passing. Demo banner, KPI cards (no NaN), 2 charts, PDF export, edit summary, short password validation (frontend + backend), invalid ObjectId 400 response - ALL working. Only bug: signup redirect to demo preview goes to /app dashboard instead. testaudit123@test.com/test123 has demo report at ID 69c991348b84d389cf2c2a22.

rca_of_issue.bug: Signup does not redirect to demo report preview
rca_of_issue.root_cause: In App.js, SignupPage is wrapped in PublicRoute. When register() calls setUser(data), React re-renders and PublicRoute returns <Navigate to='/app' replace /> because user is now truthy. This Navigate fires before or simultaneously with navigate('/app/reports/.../preview') from SignupPage.handleSubmit, causing the final URL to be /app.
rca_of_issue.reproduction: 1. Go to /signup, fill form, submit. 2. After success, observe URL is /app not /app/reports/.../preview.
rca_of_issue.mitigation: Option A: In AuthContext.register, don't call setUser - let the PublicRoute detection happen from /auth/me response. Option B: Store demo_report_id in sessionStorage before setUser, then redirect in AppDashboard on mount. Option C: navigate to preview BEFORE setUser - use navigate then setUser.
